scope: Local compact marker-atlas dictionary from 31 scRNA-seq atlas papers; records carry species, organ, evidence type, confidence, source URL, aliases, and embedded exact signature genes.
recommended_use: Annotation evidence lookup, marker panel selection, ambiguity review, and exploratory signature scoring for scRNA-seq free exploration.
license_or_terms: User-provided localized extraction from public atlas papers; cite original sources and follow source/publisher/database terms.
notes: Single compact package; 634 marker records with 5439 source exact-signature rows folded into 5435 embedded gene entries; no separate sidecar tables.
